metadata.og:description: Many friends and patients have asked about updates to my daughter and her congenital heart defect. The memories of those long, grueling and depressing nights at Children’s Hospital Los Angeles (CHLA) have seared a permanent scar in my life and it’s not something I enjoy reliving. However for the sake of closure, I will try […]
